ideation: This animation sequence depicts two robots holding hands, emphasizing gentle connection and friendship. It starts with both robots' arms relaxed at their sides, then progresses to a hand-holding position, and finally returns to a relaxed state.  The movement is slow and deliberate, reflecting a calm and friendly interaction.  Each robot will use its right arm to hold the other's hand, mirroring each other's movement.  I'll use variations in joint angles to create a natural flow, avoiding overly robotic movements.  The wrists will angle slightly to make the hand-holding look natural.

frames.beat: arms hang relaxed at sides, ready to greet
both robots reach out, right hands meeting gently
hands clasped in a friendly embrace
arms return to a relaxed, resting pose
